name_en: M13403 Black & Colorful! LV x TM Card Holder. This replica of the Louis Vuitton x Murakami collaboration series offers a playful new interpretation with rainbow tones. Made of coated canvas, the classic Monogram pattern is designed with the artist's signature vivid colors, while the top is accented with a bright pink. The card holder is suitable for large business cards and receipts inside, and features two classic card slots on the outside.

11 x 7 x 0.5 cm
